# Your Name — Personal Knowledge Base

> TODO: One-line bio. This file follows the llms.txt convention (llmstxt.org):
> an index of the site's content for LLMs. The links point at raw Markdown,
> which is the cleanest form to read. Replace https://alexlinyx.com with your domain.

## Pages

- [About](https://alexlinyx.com/content/about.md): who I am, plus education and work history
- [Research](https://alexlinyx.com/content/research.md): research projects and publications
- [Projects](https://alexlinyx.com/content/projects.md): personal and side projects
- [Classes](https://alexlinyx.com/content/classes.md): classes I teach

## Optional

- [Everything, inline](https://alexlinyx.com/llms-full.txt): all pages concatenated
